---
title: "JSM 2025 talk accepted"
date: 2025-04-02
description: "Parallel Talk. Quantifying causal effects via temporal regression discontinuity designs with time-varying effects has been accepted for a 15-minute presentation at Joint Statistical Meetings 2025 in Nashville."
categories:
  - talks
  - methods
---

My contributed submission, _"Quantifying Causal Effects via Temporal Regression Discontinuity Designs with Time-Varying Effects,"_ has been accepted for a 15-minute presentation at the Joint Statistical Meetings 2025 in Nashville, Tennessee.
